div.p: Hash map correlation between TCP state transitions using BPF_MAP_TYPE_HASH

g.title: The memory address of the struct sock in kernel space

ul.li: Unique: Per-socket pointer is guaranteed unique in the kernel.
Persistent: Valid from allocation to RCU destruction.
Efficient: Direct lookup without complex multi-key hashing.

div.p: Entries MUST be deleted on tcp_close or tcp_done. Failure to delete results in:

ol.li: Collision/Shadowing of new sockets reusing the same pointer address.

g.title: The memory address of the struct sock in kernel space
